creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 163425
upgrade gegl3 to 0.3.2

https://mail.gnome.org/archives/gimp-developer-list/2015-November/msg00049.html

gegl 0.3.2 was released - for the related babl upgrade, see bug #204744

OpenRAW support was dropped in favor of libraw support, so I changed the OPENRAW option to LIBRAW (and related changes).
poudriere log follows.
